calendar.matters:
NOTICE OF HEARING AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER (ELDER OR DEPENDENT ADULT ABUSE)
Off Calendar Dec-07-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on calendar today for Elder Adult Abuse OSC and TRO hearing this day.

Dept. 204. Judge: Peter Busch. Court Reporter: Lewis Gillian, CSR#12355. Clerk: Rosie Noguaera/Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy C. Garcia. Anthony Tam Cantonese Interpreter also present.

Petitioner: Boon H. Lee appeared with Counsel Judy Hitchcock.

Respondent: Kurt Slotkowski was not present.

Petitioner was sworn prior to the commencement of the hearing.

The Court hears testimony, receives evidence and after hearing the evidence presented, the Court will not grant a protective order with respect to Mei Fong Tsoi. Petitioner's order is Granted as follows: Respondent shall stay at least 100 yards away from the protected person: Boon H. Lee; 2 yards stay away when in the building located at 534 Broadway Street, San Francisco, CA.

Respondent shall not Physically Abuse, Financially Abuse, Intimidate, Molest, Attack, Assault (sexually or otherwise), Hit, Follow, Stalk, Threaten, Harass, Destroy Personal Property, Keep under Surveillance, or Block Movements, Contact (directly or indirectly), Telephone, Send Messages, Mail or e-Mail, Take Any Action, Directly or Through Others, to Obtain the Addresses or Locations of the Protected Persons.

No Guns or Other Firearms/Turn In or Sell Guns or Firearms.

Expires December 7, 2014.
